title: day-vault-action.v1
description: DAY cage action vocabulary (DAY-188 / developer guide §3.3). Only fund movements the cage permits. No transfer-to-arbitrary-address.

kind.description: Mechanical action. Exactly these six; no TRANSFER or free-form send.

venue.description: Target venue id for ROUTE / EXIT / HARVEST / COMPOUND

payee.description: Allowlisted payee label for AUTOPAY (never a free-form 0x address)

amountMicros.description: Non-negative integer micros as decimal string

grossYieldMicros.description: Realized gross yield for HARVEST (optional until claim)

destination.description: EXIT/COMPOUND residual must be owner wallet when set; arbitrary addresses rejected
